sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Enact to Host Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Call February 4th
feed.summary: Enact Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ACT) announced it will release its fourth quarter 2025 earnings after market close on February 3, 2026. The company will host a conference call on February 4, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss these financial results. Interested participants can pre-register for the Q&A session or view a live webcast on Enact's investor relations website.

feed.title: ANI Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:ANIP) Trading Down 6.3% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:ANIP) shares dropped 6.3% during Friday's mid-day trading on Friday, with volumes significantly lower than average. Despite the recent dip, analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $102.14. Insider selling has been observed, but institutional investors have largely increased their stakes in the company.

feed.title: Paycom Software stock: fragile rebound or value trap after a bruising year?
feed.summary: Paycom Software stock has seen a slight rebound after a significant downturn over the last year, leaving investors with considerable losses. The company is at a crossroads, with Wall Street analysts holding mixed views, ranging from cautious optimism to skepticism, as the market assesses whether its core business can stabilize growth amidst increasing competition. Future performance hinges on revenue stabilization, market share defense, strategic capital allocation, and broader software sector sentiment.

feed.title: Why Boyd (BYD) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
feed.summary: Boyd Gaming (BYD) is anticipated to beat its upcoming earnings estimates, extending a streak of outperformance. The company has a strong record of exceeding earnings expectations, with an average surprise of 10.77% over the last two quarters. This positive outlook is supported by a favorable Zacks Earnings ESP of +0.83% and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), indicating a high probability of another earnings beat.

feed.title: Caterpillar introduces AI assistant
feed.summary: Caterpillar has unveiled its new Cat AI Assistant at CES 2026, an AI-based solution designed to help customers buy, maintain, manage, and operate their equipment more efficiently. The assistant integrates Caterpillar's digital applications and operator data, providing personalized insights for faster decision-making and transforming unplanned incidents into planned maintenance. It is expected to improve productivity for operators, assist technicians with repairs, and helps address talent and skills gaps in the industry, with off-board applications launching in Q1 and in-cab validation underway.

feed.title: Capri Holdings Limited Announces Third Quarter Fiscal 2025 Results
feed.summary: Capri Holdings Limited reported a challenging third quarter for fiscal 2025, with revenue decreasing by 11.6% to $1.26 billion and a net loss of $547 million due to a significant impairment charge. All three brands—Versace, Jimmy Choo, and Michael Kors—experienced revenue declines. The company is reevaluating strategic initiatives and expects performance to improve in fiscal year 2026, targeting a return to growth in fiscal 2027.

feed.title: Generac upgraded at Baird, seeing 'unique opportunity ahead' in large diesel gensets (GNRC:NYSE)
feed.summary: Baird has upgraded Generac (GNRC) to Outperform from Neutral with a price target of $199. The upgrade is driven by unique catalysts, including the company's prospects in the commercial and industrial large diesel genset markets. Generac's stock rose by 2.5% on Friday following the news.

feed.title: Keeping the Warfighter Safer: How Textron Systems’ New Integration Expands UAS Capability
feed.summary: Textron Systems has integrated a new low SWaP, low-cost LEO beyond-line-of-sight (BLOS) transceiver into its Aerosonde UAS platform, enhancing mission flexibility and connectivity. This development paves the way for future incorporation of Starshield’s Department of Defense pLEO solution, allowing the UAS to overcome traditional line-of-sight limitations for extended ISR and distributed operations. The technology aims to empower warfighters by improving situational awareness, shortening decision cycles, and enabling a smaller, more secure operational footprint while reducing the number of personnel in harm's way.

feed.title: Fund Update: 152,368 IDEXX LABS (IDXX) shares added to CONGRESS ASSET MANAGEMENT CO portfolio
feed.summary: CONGRESS ASSET MANAGEMENT CO has increased its holdings in IDEXX LABS (IDXX) by 152,368 shares according to a recent SEC 13F filing for the report period ending 12-31-2025. The article also details recent hedge fund activity, insider trading (primarily sales), congressional trading, and analyst ratings/price targets for IDXX.

feed.title: Western Digital Shares Rise 5% After Key Trading Signal
feed.summary: Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) shares rose by over 5% following a "Power Inflow" alert from TradePulse. This signal, generated at 10:17 AM EST when WDC was at $187.86, indicated a significant shift towards buying activity from both retail and institutional traders, even after a prior 3% price drop. The stock subsequently climbed to $197.90, demonstrating the effectiveness of order flow analytics in identifying potential bullish intraday movements and trading opportunities.

feed.title: Will Gartner (IT) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
feed.summary: Gartner (IT) is poised to potentially beat its next earnings estimate, having consistently surpassed expectations in its previous two reports with an average surprise of 9.48%. The company's positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +3.48% and a strong Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) indicate a high probability of another earnings beat. This analysis suggests investors should consider Gartner as a strong candidate for a positive earnings surprise.

feed.title: Behind the Scenes of Cisco Systems's Latest Options Trends
feed.summary: Whales have shown a notably bearish stance on Cisco Systems (NASDAQ: CSCO), with 11 detected options trades indicating 54% bearish sentiment. The targeted price range for Cisco Systems over the next three months is between $70.0 and $110.0, based on options activity. Currently, CSCO is trading at $74.28, up 0.43%, and analysts maintain an average target price of $91.0 for the stock.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH): Bernstein Raises Price Target Amid Stable R
feed.summary: Bernstein analyst Lee Hambright has maintained a 'Market Perform' rating for Zimmer Biomet Holdings (ZBH) but raised the price target from $97.00 to $99.00, reflecting a positive outlook. This adjustment comes amidst varied analyst ratings for ZBH in recent months, with some analysts reiterating "Buy" or "Outperform" and others downgrading or lowering price targets. The average target price from 26 analysts is $102.35, suggesting a 9.71% upside from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a one-year GF Value of $138.42, indicating a 48.38% upside.

feed.title: Key facts: UBS raises Altria price target to $63; smoke-free growth slow
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Altria Group (MO) shares to $63.00, up from the previous target of $61.00. The adjustment comes despite UBS noting the company's slow progress in smoke-free initiatives, but anticipates potential revenue and faster EPS growth in the next two years.

feed.title: A Glimpse Into The Expert Outlook On Medtronic Through 13 Analysts
feed.summary: Thirteen analysts have provided ratings for Medtronic (NYSE: MDT) over the past three months, resulting in an average 12-month price target of $110.0, an increase of 7.76% from the previous average. The ratings show a mix of bullish and indifferent sentiments, with several analysts raising their price targets. Medtronic, a large medical device company, exhibits strong financial health with above-average market capitalization, a net margin of 15.33%, and impressive ROE and ROA figures, despite revenue growth being lower than some peers in the Health Care sector.

feed.title: Demystifying Eastman Chemical: Insights From 7 Analyst Reviews
feed.summary: Seven analysts have provided varied ratings for Eastman Chemical (EMN) over the past quarter, with an average 12-month price target of $71.86, showing a slight decrease from the previous average. Key financial indicators reveal that while the company has a strong net margin, it faces challenges in revenue growth and efficient utilization of equity and assets compared to industry averages. Analysts' actions, ratings, and updated price targets reflect evolving market sentiments and company performance.

feed.title: Beyond The Numbers: 8 Analysts Discuss Westinghouse Air Brake Stock
feed.summary: Eight analysts have recently reviewed Westinghouse Air Brake (NYSE: WAB), providing a range of evaluations from bullish to bearish. The average 12-month price target for WAB has increased by 4.19% to $235.12, with a high estimate of $258.00 and a low of $215.00. This report also details WAB's financial performance, including its market capitalization, significant revenue growth, strong net margin, and conservative debt management, while noting its below-average Return on Equity.

feed.title: Key facts: Barclays Cuts Apollo Global Management Price Target; Leadership Change Expected
feed.summary: Barclays has reduced its price target for Apollo Global Management (APO) shares from $172.00 to $168.00. Additionally, Apollo Global Management is reportedly looking to replace its European head, Rob Seminara, as the company ramps up its dealmaking activities in the region.

feed.title: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG): Bernstein Raises Price Target to $740
feed.summary: Bernstein has raised its price target for Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) to $740 from $700, maintaining an "Outperform" rating, reflecting continued confidence in the company. This follows several other analysts who also recently increased their price targets for ISRG. The consensus among Wall Street analysts remains largely positive, with an average target price of $608.48 and an "Outperform" brokerage recommendation.

feed.title: Viatris Inc.: Can a Hybrid Pharma Powerhouse Reinvent the Generic Drug Game?
feed.summary: Viatris Inc. is employing a hybrid model that merges the scale of generic drugs with branded and complex therapies to reinvent the generic drug market. The company focuses on portfolio breadth, robust manufacturing, and complex generics and biosimilars to maintain competitiveness against rivals like Teva and Sandoz. This strategy aims to provide reliable, affordable medicine globally while generating stable cash flow and potential margin expansion for investors.

feed.title: FirstEnergy announces $249 million settlement. How your bill will change
feed.summary: The Public Utilities Commission of Ohio (PUCO) has approved a $249 million settlement with FirstEnergy Corp. resolving investigations related to House Bill 6. FirstEnergy customers, specifically those of Ohio Edison, The Illuminating Company, and Toledo Edison, will receive bill credits over three billing periods, averaging about $65.61 for residential customers using 1,000 kWh per month. Additionally, $20 million from the settlement will fund low-income assistance and energy efficiency programs.

feed.title: IQVIA Holdings Inc.'s (NYSE:IQV) P/E Still Appears To Be Reasonable
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. currently trades with a high P/E ratio of 32.3x, which is above the market average, despite its recent earnings decline of 4.5%. However, analysts project a 15% annual EPS growth over the next three years, outpacing the broader market's 12% forecast. This strong future growth outlook is likely contributing to the elevated P/E, suggesting that investors are confident in the company's prospects.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Discusses Citigroup (C) in Detail
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted Citigroup (C) as a noteworthy stock, with its shares up 66% over the past year. Analysts like Bank of America and Barclays have issued optimistic reports, raising price targets and maintaining Buy/Overweight ratings, citing the stock's discounted P/E multiple compared to peers. Cramer also emphasized the broader banking sector's recovery and value, despite the prevailing focus on tech stocks.

feed.title: Scotiabank Issues Positive Forecast for Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) Stock Price
feed.summary: Scotiabank has increased its target price for Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) to C$191.00 from C$187.00, suggesting a potential upside of 3.46%. While this update indicates a positive outlook from Scotiabank, the overall analyst consensus for BMO remains a "Hold" with an average price target of C$183.08. The bank recently reported C$3.28 EPS for the quarter and has a market capitalization of C$130.88 billion with a PE ratio of 16.14.

feed.title: I Like Halliburton (HAL), Says Jim Cramer
feed.summary: Jim Cramer has expressed a positive view on Halliburton (HAL), despite recent downgrades by financial firms like Freedom Capital and Evercore due to the stock's upward momentum not aligning with oil prices. Halliburton's stock has seen an 8.6% increase so far this year. The article also touches on the company's performance post-US operations in Venezuela, suggesting it could be interesting for investors looking for oil stocks.

feed.title: The Truth About Allegion plc: Why Everyone Is Suddenly Watching This ‘Boring’ Stock
feed.summary: Allegion plc (ALLE) is presented as a "boring" but profitable stock in the building security and access control sector, offering steady gains rather than speculative highs. Despite its low social media hype compared to meme stocks, it's gaining attention from Wall Street and long-term investors due to its essential products, consistent revenue, and strong market position, especially in North America. The article positions Allegion as a reliable investment for those seeking stability and infrastructure-style tech rather than volatile, high-risk plays.

feed.title: Lululemon stock sinks nearly 5% as Supreme Court tariff ruling slips, keeping retailers on edge
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. shares dropped nearly 5% after the U.S. Supreme Court delayed a ruling on the legality of President Donald Trump’s tariffs, causing uncertainty for import-heavy retailers. The delay is significant for companies like Lululemon, which has cited tariffs as a potential $240 million hit to its fiscal 2025 gross profit. Investors are also watching Lululemon's upcoming CEO transition amid a proxy fight initiated by its founder.

feed.title: Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: APOG): Johnson Fistel Investigates Disclosures After Stock Decline
feed.summary: Johnson Fistel, PLLP is investigating Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: APOG) or its officers and directors for potential violations of federal securities laws. This investigation follows a significant stock price drop of approximately 17% after Apogee reported lower-than-expected financial results for Q3 fiscal year 2026, attributed to increased costs and the resignation of its CFO. Shareholders who suffered losses are encouraged to participate in the investigation.

feed.title: Bruker acquires additional 60% stake in Tofwerk, terms undisclosed
feed.summary: Bruker (BRKR) has acquired an additional 60% ownership stake in Tofwerk, a company specializing in TOF-MS technology. This acquisition expands Bruker's reach into markets like atmospheric chemistry, air quality monitoring, and semiconductor cleanroom monitoring. Tofwerk, with over 1,000 instruments globally and 2025 revenues of approximately $40M, will continue to operate as a distinct brand within Bruker, though the financial terms of the deal were not disclosed.

feed.title: ATRO Outperforms Industry in a Month: How to Play the Stock?
feed.summary: Astronics Corporation (ATRO) stock has significantly outperformed its industry and the S&P 500 in the past month, driven by strong demand in defense and commercial aerospace markets. The company's preliminary 2025 results show solid revenue growth and a positive outlook for 2026, with discounted valuation and strong liquidity. However, investors are cautioned about ongoing supply chain challenges in the aerospace and defense sector.

feed.title: Seagate (STX) stock rebounds toward $300 after Goldman target hike, earnings in focus
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (STX) saw its stock rebound by 5.4% to $299.92 after Goldman Sachs raised its price target to $310 and reiterated a Buy rating, citing bullish 2026 pricing forecasts. This comes as the company approaches its next earnings report, estimated around January 20th, and benefits from a revived antitrust lawsuit against NHK Spring. Investors are keenly watching Seagate's upcoming quarterly results and guidance, especially regarding storage demand driven by generative AI buildouts.

feed.title: Ceres AI Insights Now Available in John Deere Operations Center
feed.summary: Ceres AI has enhanced its integration with John Deere Operations Center, allowing farmers to access high-resolution imagery and data layers directly within the platform. This partnership aims to streamline data management, improve insights into crop health and yield risk, and reduce manual data entry for a more seamless farming experience. The integration also benefits insurers with faster access to critical farm data for underwriting.

feed.title: Builders FirstSource Faces Price Target Adjustment Amidst Strategic Shifts
feed.summary: Builders FirstSource Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) stock saw an 11.42% increase despite recent price target adjustments by UBS and Stifel, which revised their targets from $166 to $143 and $124 to $115 respectively. The company maintains an "overweight" average rating with a mean price target of $131.64, driven by strong financial performance including $16.4 billion in year-end revenue and a 31.7% ROE. Strategic acquisitions and market positioning are highlighted as key factors sustaining the company's growth and positive outlook.

feed.title: EQT stock slips as U.S. natural gas price drops 6% in midday trade
feed.summary: EQT Corp shares fell about 2.4% due to a 6.1% drop in front-month Henry Hub natural gas futures. Despite a larger-than-usual storage draw, U.S. natural gas inventories remain above the five-year average, keeping prices under pressure. Investors are watching upcoming EIA storage reports and EQT's earnings commentary for further market direction.

feed.title: Charlotte insurer fielded six bids ranging from $2.7B to $4.6B before reaching deal
feed.summary: Brighthouse Financial received six bids ranging from $2.7 billion to $4.6 billion before agreeing to a $4.1 billion acquisition deal with Aquarian. A regulatory filing revealed a competitive bidding process and an initial offer that fell through. The recent agreement follows a previous period of uncertainty regarding a potential deal for the Charlotte-based insurer.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Co. set to open in Copperas Cove this spring
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Co. is preparing to open a new location in west Copperas Cove this spring, tentatively scheduled for the second half of February. Construction is nearing completion, and the company has begun hiring for various positions at the new store. This new Tractor Supply Co. will be the second in Coryell County, serving the rural lifestyle needs of farmers, ranchers, and homeowners.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher to end operations at Weaverville site
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific plans to phase out operations at its Weaverville, N.C., facility by the end of 2026 to improve efficiency and meet customer demand. This move could impact an unspecified number of jobs, as Thermo Fisher is one of Buncombe County's largest manufacturing employers. The company has not yet disclosed details regarding the number of affected employees, potential transfers, or severance packages, stating its priority is supporting employees with care during the transition.

feed.title: Is Starbucks' Store Portfolio Reset Enhancing Unit Economics?
feed.summary: Starbucks is undergoing a strategic store portfolio reset in North America, closing underperforming locations to enhance unit economics and improve profitability. This strategy aims to shift sales to higher-productivity cafes and emphasize portfolio quality over quantity, contrasting with the expansion-focused approaches of competitors like Dutch Bros and Chipotle. While margin recovery is expected to be gradual, the company anticipates that a rationalized store network will strengthen unit-level profitability over time.

feed.title: The Truth About Public Storage: Is This Boring Stock Quietly Printing Money?
feed.summary: This article examines Public Storage (PSA), a real estate investment trust (REIT) in the self-storage industry, and its appeal as an investment. Despite its "boring" image, the company is gaining traction online and offers a reliable business model, steady dividends, and pricing power due to customer inertia. The article contrasts PSA with other storage REITs and concludes that it's a stable, long-term anchor for a diversified portfolio rather than a high-growth, high-hype stock.

feed.title: Intel, Lam Research among market cap stock movers on Friday
feed.summary: Friday's market saw significant movement in various stocks, with Intel (INTC) and Lam Research (LRCX) rallying, while Alibaba-exch (BABA) declined. The article details the biggest stock movers across mega-cap, large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap categories, highlighting specific percentage changes and underlying news for some companies.

feed.title: Argus Research Downgrades Alliant Energy (LNT) to Hold | LNT Sto
feed.summary: Argus Research has downgraded Alliant Energy (LNT) from Buy to Hold, with analyst Marie Ferguson making the announcement on January 9, 2026, without a price target adjustment. This follows previous analyst actions by UBS, B of A Securities, BMO Capital, and Barclays, which included both upgrades and downgrades, and target price adjustments. Despite the downgrade, the average Wall Street analyst target price for LNT suggests a 10.19% upside from its current price, though GuruFocus' GF Value estimates an 11.21% downside.

feed.title: Schroders (LON:SDR) Earns "Overweight" Rating from JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has reiterated an "Overweight" rating for Schroders (LON:SDR) in a recent research note. The company holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average target price of GBX 413.86. Schroders' stock performance data and key financial indicators are also provided in the report.

feed.title: Invitation Homes lease credit class action settlement
feed.summary: Invitation Homes has agreed to an undisclosed class action settlement to resolve claims that it failed to reimburse Minnesota tenants for maintenance work performed on rental properties. Class members, who leased an Invitation Homes property in Minnesota between July 12, 2015, and July 12, 2021, can receive debt relief or monetary compensation. Eligible individuals can claim $100 per month for each month they lived in a property without receiving maintenance credit, with the amount then multiplied by 55% for distribution.

feed.title: Bernstein Raises Price Target for FedEx (FDX) to $306 | FDX Stoc
feed.summary: Bernstein has raised its price target for FedEx (FDX) to $306 from $250, while maintaining a 'Market Perform' rating. This adjustment reflects an overall positive sentiment among analysts, with several firms recently increasing their price targets for the logistics giant. Despite the increased target, the average analyst forecast suggests a slight downside from FedEx's current price, though the consensus recommendation remains "Outperform."

feed.title: Vornado buys Midtown Manhattan office building for $141M, plans demolition
feed.summary: Vornado Realty Trust has acquired a 70-year-old Midtown office building for $141 million with intentions to demolish it. The company has not yet disclosed its development plans for the site, which is located near its existing Plaza District properties. This move signals a significant redevelopment project in a prominent Manhattan location.

feed.title: Applied Materials stock jumps toward $300 as TSMC sales beat and analysts lift AMAT targets
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) shares rose by 6%, surpassing $300, following strong fourth-quarter revenue reported by TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker. Analysts from Goldman Sachs and Mizuho subsequently raised their price targets for AMAT, citing increased demand for chip equipment and attractive valuations. Investors are now looking to TSMC's upcoming outlook and Applied Materials' next earnings report for further insights into 2026 spending.

feed.title: Deadline Soon: Freeport-McMoran Inc. (FCX) Shareholders Who Lost Money Urged To Contact The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz About Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The article announces a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Freeport-McMoran Inc. (FCX) regarding alleged materially false and/or misleading statements made between February 15, 2022, and September 24, 2025. The lawsuit claims Freeport failed to adequately ensure safety at its Grasberg Block Cave mine in Indonesia, leading to fatalities and significant stock price drops. Investors who lost money are urged to contact The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz by the January 12, 2026 deadline to participate as a lead plaintiff.

feed.title: CoStar Group Becomes Oversold (CSGP)
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) shares have entered oversold territory with an RSI reading of 29.7, indicating potential exhaustion of recent selling pressure. This technical signal suggests that bullish investors might start looking for entry points. The stock's current price of $59.55 is near its 52-week low of $59.33, compared to a 52-week high of $97.43.

feed.title: Scotiabank Raises Price Target for Akamai Technologies (AKAM) to $105 | AKAM Stock News
feed.summary: Scotiabank has raised its price target for Akamai Technologies (AKAM) from $94 to $105, maintaining its "Sector Outperform" rating. This 11.7% increase reflects continued confidence in the company's strong market position and growth potential, aligning with positive sentiment from other analysts. Akamai operates a content delivery network, security, and cloud computing services, with 22 analysts giving an average price target of $99.67 and an "Outperform" consensus rating.

feed.title: Devon Energy Gains From Multi-basin Portfolio, Strategic Acquisition
feed.summary: Devon Energy (DVN) is benefiting from its diverse multi-basin portfolio, astute debt and cost management, consistent free cash flow generation, and strategic acquisitions that enhance its expansion and production capabilities. The company maintains a balanced exposure to oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids, with long-term earnings growth projected at 3.28%. Despite potential headwinds from regulatory changes and limited control over third-party operated properties, DVN's shares have outperformed the industry, reflecting strong operational performance and strategic growth initiatives.
